creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Replying to an old issue. Sorry it didn't get any traction before.

I could build Apache Flink without a crash using openjdk8 and the instructions you provided.
Also the Scala module was build which showed the crash in your output. Might this crash be related to bug #233470 ?

To build Flink I needed to disable some modules in the pom.xml files, but that was because a freebsd version of a jar was not available via Maven. Not because a crash of the JVM.

I'm inclined to close this issue in a couple of days if it doesn't get any followup with information necessary to keep it open.
